summary: No security boundary tests exist for the plugin system
details: The existing registry tests cover tool registration and Zod schema conversion, but there are zero tests for: hook gating, capability enforcement, tool impersonation prevention, permission bypass via permission.ask hook, or prompt injection via experimental hooks. A plugin security test suite needs to be built.

summary: PluginTransport type imported from @opencode-ai/plugin/desktop but does not exist in SDK exports
details: The PluginTransport type referenced in plugin-transport.ts line 15 is not exported from packages/plugin/src/desktop.ts. This will fail type checking. Additionally, the preload bridge never wires pluginSend/pluginOn/pluginOff/pluginInvoke, so the NoopTransport is always used — the desktop IPC transport layer is non-functional.
